data.title: Visual Storytelling
data.description: Focuses on user-generated content that emphasizes visual engagement.
data.technical_spec: Support for photos, videos, and time-limited stories.

data.title: Community Building
data.description: Facilitates interactions through likes, comments, and shared content.

data.description: Encourages users to share genuine and relatable content.
data.technical_spec: Features like reels and stories for unfiltered expression.

data.title: Innovation
